tasks.name: Create dashboard-types.ts with 7 widget interfaces

action.target: dashboard-types.ts file with all widget type definitions

tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript types for all 7 dashboard widget data structures (CourseProgress, Assessment, KanbanSummary, ActivityFeed, QuickActions, CoachingSessions, Presentations) and the DashboardData aggregate interface

constraints: Types must match widget requirements from spec.md
Use TypeScript interface (not type) for object shapes
Nullable fields for widgets that may have no data

tasks.input_state: No dashboard types exist. Widget data structures defined in spec.md Section 5 and Appendix E.
tasks.output_state: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/dashboard-types.ts exists with 7 widget interfaces plus DashboardData aggregate interface. All types exported and documented with JSDoc comments.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists at correct path, contains all 7 widget interfaces (CourseProgress, Assessment, KanbanSummary, ActivityFeed, QuickActions, CoachingSessions, Presentations) plus DashboardData aggregate, TypeScript compiles without errors.
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-types.ts && grep -q 'export interface DashboardData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-types.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create dashboard-page.loader.ts with server-only import
tasks.purpose: Create the loader file foundation with server-only enforcement and necessary imports (logger, types, cache)
tasks.input_state: dashboard-types.ts exists with all type definitions. No loader file exists.
tasks.output_state: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts exists with server-only import, logger setup, and type imports. No functions defined yet.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists with 'import server-only' as first line, createServiceLogger setup complete, DashboardData type imported, TypeScript compiles.

tasks.name: Add placeholder loader functions for 7 widgets
tasks.purpose: Create individual placeholder loader functions (loadCourseProgress, loadAssessment, loadKanbanSummary, loadActivityFeed, loadQuickActions, loadCoachingSessions, loadPresentations) that return null, enabling incremental widget implementation in future initiatives

constraints: Add JSDoc comments indicating these are placeholders

tasks.input_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts exists with imports but no functions. Types defined in dashboard-types.ts.
tasks.output_state: 7 placeholder loader functions added to dashboard-page.loader.ts: loadCourseProgress, loadAssessment, loadKanbanSummary, loadActivityFeed, loadQuickActions, loadCoachingSessions, loadPresentations. All return Promise.resolve(null).
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All 7 functions exist in dashboard-page.loader.ts, each returns Promise.resolve(null), TypeScript compiles with correct return types.
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'async function load' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts | grep -q 7 && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add loadDashboardPageData function with Promise.all
tasks.purpose: Create the main exported loader function that uses Promise.all to fetch all widget data in parallel, wrapped with React cache() for request deduplication

constraints: Use Promise.all for parallel fetching (60-80% faster than sequential)
Wrap with cache() for request deduplication

tasks.input_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts has 7 placeholder loader functions. No main loader function exists.
tasks.output_state: Exported loadDashboardPageData function added using cache(async () => { ... }) pattern. Function calls all 7 loaders via Promise.all, logs operation, returns DashboardData object.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: loadDashboardPageData function exported, uses cache() wrapper, calls Promise.all with all 7 loaders, includes logger.info calls, TypeScript compiles, return type is DashboardData.
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export const loadDashboardPageData = cache' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'Promise.all' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck
